description:
Metroid Prime is a first-person action-adventure game originally for the Gamecube. Play as
the bounty hunter Samus Aran as she traverses the planet Tallon IV and uncovers the plans
of the Space Pirates.

v0.5.0.description:
## What's Changed:
* Changed APContainer to APPlayerContainer to achieve compatibility with AP v0.6.2
* Removed DME from the apworld because it's just in core now (thanks Wind Waker!)
* Added a requirement for 8 Energy Tanks to Magma Pool Infinite Speed trick
* Removed suit requirement for Lava Lake Suitless trick

P.S. If you're on Linux use the other apworld file on this release instead of the one in the .zip file.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Electro1512/MetroidAPrime/compare/v0.4.9...v0.5.0
v0.5.0.title: v0.5.0

v0.5.1.description:
## What's Changed:
- Added offworld models support (none, match game, match series)
- No more using Utils.get_option() as it's deprecated now
- Fixed patch file extension when downloading patch file from room
- Added detection of non-ISO formats*
- Added detection of vanilla ISO, it will disconnect you if you don't use the patched ISO
- Added manifest file for AP 0.7.0+ support
- Implemented credits spoiler (Thanks @lilDavid)
- Now you can choose between precollected and on scanned for artifact hints (Thanks @lilDavid)

For mac users it's 3.11 release that you need**
For windows and linux users it's 3.12 release that you need

**Full changelog**: https://github.com/Electro1512/MetroidAPrime/compare/main...UltiNaruto:MetroidAPrime:main

*: Remember you need to dump your copy of Metroid Prime, not download it.
**: But I didn't include the correct libs yet, please be patient and wait until 0.5.2
v0.5.1.title: v0.5.1

v0.5.2.description:
**/!\ if you downloaded this earlier, redownload the apworld because I brainfarted severely..**

## What's Changed:
- Fix crash when using plando_items (Thanks @ProfBytes)
- Temp folder is no more needed and was completely removed*
- Energy tank capacity can now be set up to 1000 HP logically (with a step of 100)

*: Now you are required to extract libs-`your OS`-`3.11 or 3.12`.zip to your `lib` folder in `Archipelago` folder. If you played Luigi's Mansion, this is similar.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/UltiNaruto/MetroidAPrime/compare/v0.5.1...v0.5.2

## New Contributors
* @ProfBytes made their first contribution in https://github.com/UltiNaruto/MetroidAPrime/pull/3

**As per usual, I remind you that you need to dump your copy of Metroid Prime and not download it.**
v0.5.2.title: v0.5.2

v0.5.3.description:
/!\ This release is not back compatible with earlier versions

# Apworld changes :
  - Starting inventory is now fully local
  - Door shields now match their blast shields if it's a beam combo or bomb blast shield
  - Added warning for randomized beam that can force Remove Hive Mecha on
  - Show starting items in credits

# Library changes :
  - Updated to latest randomprime patcher
  - Libs are now auto installed in lib folder

# Bug fixes :
  - Now supports again Metroid Zero Mission offworld models
  - Progressive items doesn't send multiple times anymore
  - Fix scan for mission objectives when genning with multiple Metroid Prime players

# Logic has been updated :
  - Added new trick Research Lab Aether Upper Item with DBJ
  - Added Power Bomb logic for Sandstone blocks
  - Furnace Upper Item now requires Bombs or Spring Ball
  - Phazon Mining Tunnel now requires Boost to traverse both directions
  - Frost Cave Access doesn't require Bombs or Spring Ball anymore

# New features :
  - Shuffle Unlimited Missiles
  - Shuffle Unlimited Power Bombs
  - Spring Ball can now be its own item (has logic now + can be progressive aka Spring Ball then Bombs)

## New Contributors
* @NPCPotPie made their first contribution in https://github.com/UltiNaruto/MetroidAPrime/pull/4
* @Aureooo-0 made their first contribution in https://github.com/UltiNaruto/MetroidAPrime/pull/5
* OniHelix for creating the icon of the apworld
* Nova for editing the icon of the apworld to add transparency to the background

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/UltiNaruto/MetroidAPrime/compare/v0.5.2...v0.5.3
v0.5.3.title: v0.5.3

v0.5.3-h1.description:
# APWorld Changes
First non starting item index now defaults to 0 if not present

# Library Changes
Moved auto installing libs to on client launch

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/UltiNaruto/MetroidAPrime/compare/v0.5.3...v0.5.3-h1
v0.5.3-h1.title: v0.5.3-h1

v0.5.4.description:
# Apworld changes :
- Prefill is now done when creating locations
- Removed Missile Launcher from pool if mains aren't required
- Removed Main Power Bomb from pool if mains aren't required
- Vanilla ROM detected is its own status and can be seen in /status
- Client can now process arguments from command line
- Client Tracker is now a thing
- UT integration has been added
- Non local items now override starting room loadout
- Added mp1_iso argument to override iso path of host.yaml
- Moved cosmetic options (suit and hud) to host.yaml
- Can now customize default options in host.yaml
- Improved emulator settings in host.yaml
- Improves support for tooltips in Options Creator and for template yaml
- Added Metroid: Samus Returns offworld models support

# Bug fixes :
- Fixed Progressive Bomb being always on when only Progressive Beams are on
- Fixed first Power Bomb not giving the correct amount of ammo
- Fixed locked door type being unusable
- Added cutscene and IGT check before allowing receiving items
- Fixed credits not adjusting properly to options

# Logic has been updated :
- Fixed logic bug with Chozo Ice Temple not requiring bombs
- Added missing Scan Visor check for climbing Sun Tower
- Added option check for beating Flaahgra with PBs
- Removing unneeded duplicate check for Main Quarry item
- Mine Security Station wouldn't check for Wave Beam pirates
- Added Wave Beam pirates as a check to go the top of Elite Research
- Ore Processing to Elevator Access A was wrongly checking for PB and Grapple
- Ore Processing tricks required bombs when it wasn't needed
- Fixed Chozo Ruins - Sun Tower, you cannot climb it with Spring Ball from bottom

# Library changes :
- Updated ppc-asm to 1.6.1

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/UltiNaruto/MetroidAPrime/compare/v0.5.3...v0.5.4
v0.5.4.title: v0.5.4

v0.5.4-h1.description:
# Apworld changes :
- Added new command `/export_iso` which allows the user to reexport their iso if they started the client from the apmp1 file
- Made the zip build optional for releases
- Now the update lib function will clear properly old versions

# Logic has been updated :
- Fixed a bug where Ruined Courtyard to Quarantine Access would bypass the door requirement if the trick for climbing there was set.
- Fixed a bug where Ruined Nursery would expect Power Bombs to break crates when it's completely impossible

# Library changes :
- Updated py-randomprime to 1.31.1
- Updated ppc-asm to 1.9.0

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/UltiNaruto/MetroidAPrime/compare/v0.5.4...v0.5.4-h1
v0.5.4-h1.title: v0.5.4-h1
